title: Kyiv: Energy infrastructure hit
description: Major fire seen after Ukrainian drones reportedly strike oil refinery in Ryazan. Ukraine's military reportedly launched a large-scale drone attack overnight on May 15, striking Russian military and energy infrastructure in multiple regions of the country, Russian Telegram media channels reported.

title: Drone strike
description: Video of the combat work of the air defense units of the "West" Air Command of the Air Forces of the Armed Forces of Ukraine during the repulse of a massive enemy strike by drones in the west of our country on May 13. Mobile fire groups, aviation, units of anti-aircraft missile troops and electronic warfare, crews of unmanned aircraft
description_en: Video of the combat work of the air defense units of the "West" Air Command of the Air Forces of the Armed Forces of Ukraine during the repulse of a massive enemy strike by drones in the west of our country on May 13. Mobile fire groups, aviation, units of anti-aircraft missile troops and electronic warfare, crews of unmanned aircraft
description_uk: Відео бойової роботи підрозділів протиповітряної оборони Повітряне командування "Захід" Повітряних Сил ЗС України під час відбиття ворожого масованого удару дронами по заходу нашої країни 13 травня. Мобільні вогневі групи, авіація, підрозділи зенітних ракетних військ та радіоелектронної боротьби, екіпажі безпілотних авіа

title: Kyiv: 101 missiles
description: We are carefully establishing exactly what weapons – which missiles and drones – the Russians used this time. It was a Kh-101 missile that struck a residential building in Kyiv, according to preliminary data. The missile was manufactured in the second quarter of this year. This means Russia is still importing the components, resources, and equipment necessary for missile production in...

title: 101 missiles
description: We find out in detail which weapons - which missiles and drones - the Russians used this time. According to preliminary data, a Kh-101 missile hit a house in Kyiv. Production - the second quarter of this year. And this means that Russia still imports components for the production of missiles, the necessary resources and equipment to bypass global sanctions. And this should be the real goal of all our partners -...
description_en: We find out in detail which weapons - which missiles and drones - the Russians used this time. According to preliminary data, a Kh-101 missile hit a house in Kyiv. Production - the second quarter of this year. And this means that Russia still imports components for the production of missiles, the necessary resources and equipment to bypass global sanctions. And this should be the real goal of all our partners -...
description_uk: Детально зʼясовуємо, яку саме зброю – які саме ракети і дрони – росіяни застосовували цього разу. У Києві по будинку, за попередніми даними, було влучання ракети Х-101. Виробництво – другий квартал цього року. І це означає, що компоненти для виробництва ракет, необхідні ресурси та устаткування Росія в обхід глобальних санкцій усе ще завозить. І це має бути реальною ціллю всіх наших партнерів –...

title: 7 killed
description: 🕯 May 15 is declared a Day of Mourning in Kyiv for the victims of the most massive attack on the capital - Klitschko. State flags will be lowered in Kyiv, and all entertainment events will be canceled. At the moment, it is known about 7 dead. The rescue operation continues.
description_en: 🕯 May 15 is declared a Day of Mourning in Kyiv for the victims of the most massive attack on the capital - Klitschko. State flags will be lowered in Kyiv, and all entertainment events will be canceled. At the moment, it is known about 7 dead. The rescue operation continues.
description_uk: 🕯15 мая в Киеве объявлен Днем траура по жертвам самой массированной атаки на столицу, — Кличко В Киеве приспустят государственные флаги, а также отменят все развлекательные мероприятия. На данный момент известно о 7 погибших. Спасательная операция продолжается.

title: Kyiv: ‘Teachers told children Ukraine does not exist’ — Kyiv brings back 8...

description: ‘Teachers told children Ukraine does not exist’ — Kyiv brings back 8 children from Russian-occupied territories. “Yet thousands of children remain trapped, forced to forget their roots while being openly prepared for war. But we will not stop,” Save Ukraine stated.

title: The Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Ukraine welcomes the involvement...
title_en: The Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Ukraine welcomes the involvement...
title_uk: Міністерство закордонних справ України вітає залучення...
description: The Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Ukraine welcomes the involvement of the Moscow Mechanism of the OSCE in response to the Russian Federation's systemic policy of indoctrination, militarization, forced assimilation and destruction of the Ukrainian identity of children under the control of the aggressor state. This decision is timely and principled. Russia is trying to turn Ukrainian children into an object of imperial...
description_en: The Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Ukraine welcomes the involvement of the Moscow Mechanism of the OSCE in response to the Russian Federation's systemic policy of indoctrination, militarization, forced assimilation and destruction of the Ukrainian identity of children under the control of the aggressor state. This decision is timely and principled. Russia is trying to turn Ukrainian children into an object of imperial...
description_uk: Міністерство закордонних справ України вітає задіяння Московського механізму ОБСЄ у відповідь на системну політику Російської Федерації з індоктринації, мілітаризації, примусової асиміляції та знищення української ідентичності дітей, які перебувають під контролем держави-агресора. Це рішення є своєчасним і принциповим. Росія намагається перетворити українських дітей на об’єкт імперського...

title: One of the main qualities of a scout is versatility. You never know...
title_en: One of the main qualities of a scout is versatility. You never know...
title_uk: Однією з головних якостей скаута є універсальність. Ніколи не знаєш...
description: One of the main qualities of a scout is versatility. You never know what will be needed tomorrow: a machine gun, a machine gun, a drone or work in complete silence. That is why a scout must be able to use any weapon and do it confidently and professionally. Versatility is not "knowing a little bit of everything" - it is being ready for any situation. Adapt quickly and work where others get lost….
description_en: One of the main qualities of a scout is versatility. You never know what will be needed tomorrow: a machine gun, a machine gun, a drone or work in complete silence. That is why a scout must be able to use any weapon and do it confidently and professionally. Versatility is not "knowing a little bit of everything" - it is being ready for any situation. Adapt quickly and work where others get lost….
description_uk: Одна з головних якостей розвідника - універсальність. Ти ніколи не знаєш, що знадобиться завтра: автомат, кулемет, дрон чи робота в повній тиші. Саме тому розвідник має вміти користуватись будь-якою зброєю і робити це впевнено та професійно. Універсальність - це не “вміти потрохи все” - це бути готовим до будь-якої ситуації. Швидко адаптуватись та працювати там, де інші губляться....

title: Shelling near civilians
description: Katsapnya killed a 12-year-old girl in Kyiv - this is the fifth victim of the night shelling, - Klitschko According to him, there are still people under the rubble.
description_en: Katsapnya killed a 12-year-old girl in Kyiv - this is the fifth victim of the night shelling, - Klitschko According to him, there are still people under the rubble.
description_uk: Кацапня убила в Киеве 12-летнюю девочку - это пятая жертва ночного обстрела, - Кличко По его словам, под завалами еще остаются люди.

title: Missile attack
description: There will be a fair response to all Russian attacks, - Zelenskyi He also noted that during the last attacks it was possible to shoot down a significant number of missiles and drones: the total percentage of downed targets is 93%.
description_en: There will be a fair response to all Russian attacks, - Zelenskyi He also noted that during the last attacks it was possible to shoot down a significant number of missiles and drones: the total percentage of downed targets is 93%.
description_uk: На все российские удары последует справедливый ответ, - Зеленский Он также отметил, что во время последних атак удалось сбить значительное количество ракет и дронов: общий процент сбитых целей - 93%.
